SynapseOpportunisticTaskDef.label: Memory Generation
SynapseOpportunisticTaskDef.description: When the LLM queue is idle, generates personalized AI-written memories for colonists based on recent events. Memories carry weighted tags and decay over time.

SynapseOpportunisticTaskDef.label: Visitor Backstory
SynapseOpportunisticTaskDef.description: During idle time, generates LLM backstories for important NPCs (faction leaders, prisoners, royalty, family members) who are currently on the map.
